title: Quick Switcher Key shortcut, but for custom filters
excerpt: I’ve described the feature here in this annotated screenshot – basically, a CMD-F only instead of for items, for filters. Filters would be a lot more useful if you could quickly access them instead of having to click & s…

posts.author: dougpa (Doug Pagani)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve described the feature here in this annotated screenshot – basically, a CMD-F only instead of for items, for filters. Filters would be a lot more useful if you could quickly access them instead of having to click & scroll around. The board-switch binding (CMD-B) is nice, and so is record-finding (CMD-f), but my most common usage of mondaydotcom is to use filtered views.
